title: Author an S3 Lifecycle Policy
description:
## Tier Cold Data to Glacier

Lifecycle rules move objects to cheaper storage automatically as they age.

**Your task:** write an S3 lifecycle configuration at **`/root/lifecycle.json`** with a **`Rules`** list containing a rule that **transitions** objects to **`GLACIER`** after **30 days**.

> 💡 The shape is `{ "Rules": [ { "ID": "...", "Status": "Enabled", "Filter": {"Prefix": ""}, "Transitions": [ { "Days": 30, "StorageClass": "GLACIER" } ] } ] }`.

hints.title: Lifecycle rule with a transition
hints.body: A rule needs a Status and a Transitions list specifying Days and StorageClass.

validation.description: Checks for a Rules list with a GLACIER transition.

commands.description: A rule transitions objects to GLACIER
commands.command: python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open('/root/lifecycle.json')); r=d.get('Rules',[]); ok=isinstance(r,list) and any('GLACIER' in json.dumps(rule).upper() and 'TRANSITION' in json.dumps(rule).upper() for rule in r); print('ok' if ok else 'no')"
